source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In Fig. 3.66 the 4 basic logic gate symbols are shown. Match them to the negative logic equivalents on the right.

image_dependency: question_text explicitly refers to 'Fig. 3.66' and asks to match symbols shown in the figure
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the core information is visual rather than textual
the task depends on recognizing logic-gate symbols and their placement on the right side of the image
multi_step: the answer requires producing four pairwise matches rather than identifying a single item
solving needs visual recognition of multiple symbols plus reasoning about negative-logic equivalence
the output format '1 and 7, 2 and 6, 3 and 5, 4 and 8' implies repeated comparison/mapping across two sets
verifiability: answer_text is explicit and structured as concrete pairings that can be checked against the figure
registry_passed=true, question_present=true, and answer_present=true support downstream checking feasibility
the domain is constrained (4 basic logic gates and 4 negative-logic equivalents), so correctness is not open-ended

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和核心图像资产齐全，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空，核心语义支撑充分
初步评分中 image_dependency、verifiability 和 multi_step 均较高，说明该样本有明确的视觉推理价值且可核验
虽然存在 answer_type_mismatch_between_input_and_registry 和需要领域知识核验的风险，但这些属于质量与验证成本问题，不构成核心语义缺失
